hints.title: Nudge
hints.content: Look at the URL when viewing an article. The ID parameter is passed directly to the database.

hints.title: Direction
hints.content: The query selects title, content, and author — 3 columns. You'll need a UNION with matching columns to pull data from another table.

hints.title: Approach
hints.content: Try: /article?id=0 UNION SELECT note,2,3 FROM admin_notes — using 0 ensures the original query returns nothing so only your injected row shows.

hints.title: Near-solution
hints.content: Use /article?id=0 UNION SELECT note,2,3 FROM admin_notes LIMIT 1 to extract the flag from the admin_notes table.

hints.title: Solution
hints.content: Navigate to /article?id=0 UNION SELECT note,2,3 FROM admin_notes-- The admin_notes table has a 'note' column containing the flag. Using id=0 returns no real article, so the UNION result is displayed as the article title.
